Localization.Description: Redis attack protection system was triggered. This may be caused by cross-site scripting or a suspicious change to the "maxmemory" configuration parameter.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The "maxmemory" parameter value is less than 1 MB on host {event_src.host}
The "maxmemory" parameter value was reduced on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
Possible attack using POST or Host: commands on host {event_src.host}, connection aborted. Event context: {reason}.
